violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of dilly bars and cake blanks were stored on the floor under the shelves in the walk in freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The back of the white cabinets in the cake decorating room are bare wood and not a cleanable surface. These need to be painted, or sealed.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The bottom of the front prep cooler holding whipped topping needs to be cleaned.

Backflow prevention. — --Plumbing system was not installed to preclude backflow of a solid, liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply system. The sprayer hose when extended went below the sink level for water. There was not a vacuum breaker installed on the faucet system for the back three compartment sink. A vacuum breaker must be installed, or shorter hose to keep the sprayer above sink level.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The wall, ceiling, and vent above the food warmer in the kitchen needs to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Wall tiles are missing from the wall behind one of the ice cream machines. Broken floor tile by the slushie machine.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of cake blanks, buster bars, and starkiss were stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. The fan in the women’s restroom was not working.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Missing wall tile behind the ice cream machine by the door to the kitchen.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
